title: DreamBooth: Fine Tuning Text-to-Image Diffusion Models for Subject-Driven Generation
hook: Imagine a dog in any style, from just a few photos of your own pet.
promise: You will understand how DreamBooth personalizes text-to-image models using just a handful of subject images.
prerequisite_note: You only need to grasp that diffusion models generate images by gradually refining noise into pictures.

glossary.plain: A type of AI that creates images by turning random noise into realistic pictures through stepwise refinement.
Adjusting a pre-trained model on new, specific data to specialize it further.
Making images that consistently feature a particular object, person, or pet.
A unique word added to prompts that tells the model to use your specific subject.
When a model memorizes the training images and loses its ability to generalize.
Crafting the input text to guide what the model generates.

cards.title: Your dog in Van Gogh
body: Learn how DreamBooth lets AI models generate images of your chosen subject in any style.

cards.title: Can AI remember your dog?
body: Imagine you want a painting of your own dog wearing a crown, in the style of Van Gogh. Most AI image generators struggle to recreate your specific pet from just a few photos.
DreamBooth solves this by teaching the AI to recognize your subject, so you can create endless variations featuring your own dog, toy, or even a special object.

cards.title: From photos to personalized art
body: First, you collect a handful of photos of your subject, like your dog.
Next, DreamBooth fine-tunes a pre-trained diffusion model using these images, teaching it a new identifier token that represents your subject.
Finally, you can use prompts with this token to generate images of your dog in any setting or style you imagine.
cards.caption: DreamBooth connects your real subject to the creative power of AI art.

cards.title: How does DreamBooth compare to generic models?
body: Suppose you ask for a painting of your dog in a fantasy castle.
cards.offNote: Produces a random dog that looks nothing like yours.
cards.onNote: Generates your actual dog, recognized and placed in the fantasy scene.

cards.title: The trick: teaching the model a new word
body: DreamBooth introduces a unique identifier token, like 'sks dog,' into the model's vocabulary. This token is linked to your specific subject during fine-tuning.
Whenever you use this token in a prompt, the model recalls the visual details of your subject and blends them into any scene or style you describe.

cards.title: How much should the model specialize?
body: Adjust how closely the model sticks to your subject's features versus generating creative variations.
cards.low: Subject looks generic and may lose identity.
cards.mid: Subject is recognizable but allows some creative changes.
cards.high: Subject is almost identical to your photos, but less variety in outputs.

cards.title: What does DreamBooth need?
body: Pick the core ingredients that let DreamBooth personalize image generation.

choices.label: Pre-trained diffusion model
choices.note: The starting point for image generation.

choices.label: Subject photos
choices.note: A small set of images of your unique subject.

choices.label: Identifier token
choices.note: A new word that represents your subject in prompts.

choices.label: Fine-tuning process
choices.note: Adjusts the model to learn your subject.

choices.label: Prompt with identifier
choices.note: Guides the model to use your subject.

choices.label: Regularization
choices.note: Prevents the model from forgetting how to generate other images.

cards.title: DreamBooth’s personal touch
body: DreamBooth set a new standard for personalized image generation, producing faithful, creative images from as few as 3 to 5 photos.
It also inspired a wave of research into model customization and creative uses of diffusion models for individuals.

bars.label: Prompt flexibility
bars.note: Works with varied styles and scenes

bars.label: Few-shot learning
bars.note: Needs only a handful of images

bars.label: Generalization
bars.note: Avoids overfitting to just your images

cards.caption: DreamBooth balances faithfulness to your subject with creative flexibility.

cards.title: Why DreamBooth matters
body: DreamBooth opened the door to truly personal AI art, putting your own memories, pets, or objects into any scene you imagine.
Its approach to fine-tuning became a foundation for further research in personalized generative models and creative expression.

recap.label: Collect
recap.note: Gather a few photos of your unique subject.

recap.label: Tokenize
recap.note: Assign a special identifier token to your subject.

recap.label: Fine-tune
recap.note: Train the model to link the token to your subject's features.

recap.label: Generate
recap.note: Create images of your subject in any prompt or style.

cards.title: DreamBooth: Fine Tuning Text-to-Image Diffusion Models for Subject-Driven Generation
body: Read the paper to explore the full details and see more creative results.
